Deputy City Attorney, Frederick P. Sheinfield of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-3872) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND JOSE CISNEROS' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiffs allege sufficient facts to support both claims and both claims are legally cognizable. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
